creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Fri, 07 Feb 2014 09:44:20 -0600 Bryan Drewery wrote:
> exp-run done.
> 
> Logs at: 
> http://package20.nyi.freebsd.org/bulk/10amd64-default-baseline/2014-02-06_17h12m20s
> 
> New failures (some may be false positive):
> + {"origin"=>"cad/gmsh-occ", "pkgname"=>"gmsh-occ-2.8.3_1", 
> "phase"=>"build", "errortype"=>"linker_error"}
> + {"origin"=>"devel/allegro-devel", "pkgname"=>"allegro-devel-5.0.9", 
> "phase"=>"build/runaway", "errortype"=>"runaway_process"}
> + {"origin"=>"french/aster", "pkgname"=>"fr-aster-10.8.0.3_1", 
> "phase"=>"build", "errortype"=>"cluster"}
> + {"origin"=>"graphics/py3-cairo", "pkgname"=>"py33-cairo-1.10.0_1", 
> "phase"=>"build", "errortype"=>"process_failed"}
> + {"origin"=>"java/eclipse", "pkgname"=>"eclipse-3.7.1_4", 
> "phase"=>"build", "errortype"=>"cluster"}
> + {"origin"=>"java/jboss71", "pkgname"=>"jboss71-7.1.3", 
> "phase"=>"build", "errortype"=>"cluster"}
> + {"origin"=>"multimedia/mythtv", "pkgname"=>"mythtv-0.27.0.20140121", 
> "phase"=>"build", "errortype"=>"linker_error"}
> + {"origin"=>"multimedia/mythtv-frontend", 
> "pkgname"=>"mythtv-frontend-0.27.0.20140121", "phase"=>"build", 
> "errortype"=>"linker_error"}
> + {"origin"=>"science/mpqc", "pkgname"=>"mpqc-2.3.1_17", 
> "phase"=>"build", "errortype"=>"missing_header"}
> 
> Once you go through and verify false-positives, approved to commit.
> 

Are you sure this list is correct?  It's missing at least math/arpack:
http://package20.nyi.freebsd.org/bulk/10amd64-default-pr_185372/2014-02-06_01h18m17s/logs/errors/arpack-96_11.log
(It will have to use tradcpp here.)
